name: Piwafwi of Fire Resistance
description:
This dark spider silk cloak is made by {@creature drow}. It is a {@item cloak of elvenkind}. It also grants resistance to fire damage while you wear it. It loses its magic if exposed to sunlight for 1 hour without interruption.
While you wear this cloak with its hood up, Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) checks made to see you have disadvantage. and you have advantage on Dexterity ({@skill Stealth}) checks made to hide, as the cloak's color shifts to camouflage you. Pulling the hood up or down requir
